void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:multifields="multifields" xmlns:multifieldsstring="multifieldsstring" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero MD5Hex ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion multifields multifieldsstring myext rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_Input1" select="document('Input1')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <fundtransfer> <Amount> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/Amount"></xsl:value-of> </Amount> <TxnFee> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/TxnFee"></xsl:value-of> </TxnFee> <FromAccount> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/FromAccount"></xsl:value-of> </FromAccount> <ToAccount> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/ToAccount"></xsl:value-of> </ToAccount> <Remark> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/Remark"></xsl:value-of> </Remark> <TransId> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/TransId"></xsl:value-of> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ESBX__SYSTEM__USER_DEFINED_DOC_ID', $document_Input1/fundtransfer/TransId)"></xsl:value-of> </TransId> <CurrenCy> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/CurrenCy"></xsl:value-of> </CurrenCy> <TxnType> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/TxnType"></xsl:value-of> </TxnType> <debitcurrency> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/debitcurrency"></xsl:value-of> </debitcurrency> <merchantID> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/merchantID"></xsl:value-of> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_Input1/fundtransfer/merchantID)=('900010000020001')"> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ValidateMerchantID', '00000GDT')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="($document_Input1/fundtransfer/merchantID)=('900010000020002')"> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ValidateMerchantID', '00000EDC')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="java:_setStringProperty($_TIF_MESSAGE_, 'ValidateMerchantID', '00000MMS')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </merchantID> <merchantName> <xsl:value-of select="$document_Input1/fundtransfer/merchantName"></xsl:value-of> </merchantName> </fundtransfer> </xsl:template> <!--The list of parameters defined by user--> <xsl:param name="_TIF_MESSAGE_"></xsl:param> </xsl:stylesheet>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="fundtransfer">
<xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="Amount" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnFee" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="FromAccount" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ToAccount" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Remark" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TransId" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="CurrenCy" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="TxnType" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="debitcurrency" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="merchantID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="merchantName" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="fundtransfer">
<xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="Amount" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnFee" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="FromAccount" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ToAccount" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Remark" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TransId" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="CurrenCy" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="TxnType" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="debitcurrency" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="merchantID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="merchantName" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence>
</xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
